mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MINUTES ( MINUTE_SEQ, TITLE, MEETING_DT, START_TIME, END_TIME, MAIN_CONTENT, DECISIONS, TODOS, USERS_ID, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( MINUTES_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{title}, #{meetingDt}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{mainContent}, #{decisions, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{todos, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{usersId}, SYSDATE )
